final:
module down_counter (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input [3:0] start_value,
    output reg [3:0] count
);

// On reset, set count to start_value.
always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
    if (rst) begin
        count <= start_value;
    end else if (count > 0) begin
        count <= count - 1;
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (1'b1) begin
        count <= 4'b0000;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
